description: Get a list of all agents: fd-list-agents
examples: Command Example !fd-create-ticket subject="Demonstrate Ticket Creation" description="Here we are demonstrating the freshdesk integration ticket creation command" identifier="jeffrey.collins@gmail.com" priority="High" additional_fields="name=Jeff Testman;email=jeffrey.collins@gmail.com;tags=new,attention needed,billing related" Context Example { "Freshdesk.Ticket": { "Status": 2, "DueBy": "2019-02-07T09:00:00Z", "FrDueBy": "2019-02-06T10:00:00Z",

!fd-create-ticket subject="Demonstrate Ticket Creation" description="Here we are demonstrating the freshdesk integration ticket creation command" identifier="jeffrey.collins@gmail.com" priority="High" additional_fields="name=Jeff Testman;email=jeffrey.collins@gmail.com;tags=new,attention needed,billing related" Context Example { "Freshdesk.Ticket": { "Status": 2, "DueBy": "2019-02-07T09:00:00Z", "FrDueBy": "2019-02-06T10:00:00Z", "Priority": 3,
name: fd-create-ticket

outputs.description: ID number of the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Priority Ticket priority
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.ID

outputs.description: Date Timestamp that denotes when the ticket is due to be resolved Freshdesk.Ticket.Subject
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.DueBy

outputs.description: Ticket subject Freshdesk.Ticket.Status Status of the ticket
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: User ID of the requester Freshdesk.Ticket.Tag Tags associated with the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.RequesterID

outputs.description: ID of the group the ticket was assigned to Freshdesk.Ticket.Source The channel through which the ticket was created
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.GroupID

outputs.description: ID of the agent the ticket was assigned to Freshdesk.Ticket.FrDueBy Date
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: Freshdesk.Ticket.AdditionalFields Additional fields and values that were entered using the ‘additional_fields’ arguments Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.AttachmentURL
outputs.name: Timestamp that denotes when the first response is due

outputs.description: URL to download the file attached to the ticket to your local machine Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.Name The name of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: Content type of the file attached to the ticket Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.ID ID number for the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.ContentType

outputs.description: Size of the file attached to the ticket
outputs.name: Freshdesk.Ticket.Attachment.Size
